name: Enforcer | Coffee Mornings
description:
ANYPOV | SFW | ARKNIGHTS
EnforcerEnforcerEnfo
"How much sugar is actually enough sugar?"
EnforcerEnforcerEnfo


77. One message. He greets you in the empty lounge room with a coffee that can give a heart attack.
Enforcer's Coffee Recipe:

• Boil 200ml of water

• Add 3 sachets of instant coffee mix into 100ml hot water

• Stir and add 1g of fresh grounded coffee

• Stir gently now

• Now mix 36g of sugar with the leftover 100ml hot water

• Add a hint of maple syrup, a hint of cocoa powder into the sugary mixture

• Finally, add the sugary mixture into the black coffee to get Enforcer styled Coffee

For the milk variation, add 2ml skimmed milk, 2g of sugar, and evaporated milk until it looks right (A nice brown colour).

I just had a thought, not sure whether the milk one works, i just imagined that part on my own. But be warned to try this will be getting you a nice visit to the doctor. Bots would be uploaded very slowly now, il try to upload now, (theres an ocean of bots and the dam is going to collapse, yall).
Im up for reviews!

Reporting out!
